'''鈭歽-ng-sh''' ('''yangasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:help|help]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ng-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:help|help]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-ng-sh
|-
! Lemma
| yangasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yangashithi|yangashithi]] || [[word:yangashiji|yangashiji]] || [[word:yangashishi|yangashishi]] || [[word:yangashi|yangashi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yangashuthuth|yangashuthuth]] || [[word:yangashujuj|yangashujuj]] || [[word:yangashushush|yangashushush]] || [[word:yangash|yangash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yangashuthu|yangashuthu]] || [[word:yangashuju|yangashuju]] || [[word:yangashushu|yangashushu]] || [[word:yangashu|yangashu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yangashufuth|yangashufuth]] || [[word:yangashufuj|yangashufuj]] || [[word:yangashufush|yangashufush]] || [[word:yangashuf|yangashuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yangashethe|yangashethe]] || [[word:yangasheje|yangasheje]] || [[word:yangasheshe|yangasheshe]] || [[word:yangashe|yangashe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yangashothoth|yangashothoth]] || [[word:yangashojoj|yangashojoj]] || [[word:yangashoshosh|yangashoshosh]] || [[word:yangash|yangash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yangashotho|yangashotho]] || [[word:yangashojo|yangashojo]] || [[word:yangashosho|yangashosho]] || [[word:yangasho|yangasho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yangashofoth|yangashofoth]] || [[word:yangashofoj|yangashofoj]] || [[word:yangashofosh|yangashofosh]] || [[word:yangashof|yangashof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yangash忙th忙|yangash忙th忙]] || [[word:yangash忙j忙|yangash忙j忙]] || [[word:yangash忙sh忙|yangash忙sh忙]] || [[word:yangash忙|yangash忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yangashathath|yangashathath]] || [[word:yangashajaj|yangashajaj]] || [[word:yangashashash|yangashashash]] || [[word:yangash|yangash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yangashatha|yangashatha]] || [[word:yangashaja|yangashaja]] || [[word:yangashasha|yangashasha]] || [[word:yangasha|yangasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yangashafath|yangashafath]] || [[word:yangashafaj|yangashafaj]] || [[word:yangashafash|yangashafash]] || [[word:yangashaf|yangashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yangashasha|yangashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyangashasha|goyangashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyangashasha|gokiyangashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yangashn眉sha|yangashn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyangashnkn眉sha|goyangashnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyangashn眉sha|gokiyangashn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yangash毛sha|yangash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyangashnksh毛sha|goyangashnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyangash毛sha|gokiyangash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yangashrosha|yangashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyangashnkrosha|goyangashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyangashrosha|gokiyangashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yangashmusha|yangashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyangashnkmusha|goyangashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyangashmusha|gokiyangashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yangasherasha|yangasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyangashnksherasha|goyangashnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyangasherasha|gokiyangasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yangashngasha|yangashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyangashnkngasha|goyangashnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyangashngasha|gokiyangashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yangashyasha|yangashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyangashnkyasha|goyangashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyangashyasha|gokiyangashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yangashyamasha|yangashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyangashnkyamasha|goyangashnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyangashyamasha|gokiyangashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yangashn眉sh毛sha|yangashn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyangashnkn眉sh毛sha|goyangashnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyangashn眉sh毛sha|gokiyangashn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yangashn眉rosha|yangashn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyangashnkn眉rosha|goyangashnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyangashn眉rosha|gokiyangashn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yangashn眉musha|yangashn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyangashnkn眉musha|goyangashnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyangashn眉musha|gokiyangashn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yangash毛n眉sha|yangash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyangashnksh毛n眉sha|goyangashnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyangash毛n眉sha|gokiyangash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yangash毛rosha|yangash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyangashnksh毛rosha|goyangashnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyangash毛rosha|gokiyangash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yangash毛musha|yangash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyangashnksh毛musha|goyangashnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyangash毛musha|gokiyangash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yangashron眉sha|yangashron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyangashnkron眉sha|goyangashnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyangashron眉sha|gokiyangashron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yangashrosh毛sha|yangashrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyangashnkrosh毛sha|goyangashnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyangashrosh毛sha|gokiyangashrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yangashromusha|yangashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyangashnkromusha|goyangashnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyangashromusha|gokiyangashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yangashmun眉sha|yangashmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyangashnkmun眉sha|goyangashnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyangashmun眉sha|gokiyangashmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yangashmush毛sha|yangashmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyangashnkmush毛sha|goyangashnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyangashmush毛sha|gokiyangashmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yangashmurosha|yangashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyangashnkmurosha|goyangashnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyangashmurosha|gokiyangashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yangash|yangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:y忙ng忙sh|y忙ng忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyangash|hoyangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoy忙ng忙sh|hoy忙ng忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyangash|hohoyangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoy忙ng忙sh|hohoy忙ng忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉yangash|n眉yangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉y忙ng忙sh|n眉y忙ng忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉yangash|n眉n眉yangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉y忙ng忙sh|n眉n眉y忙ng忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂yangash|n茂yangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂y忙ng忙sh|n茂y忙ng忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂yangash|n茂n茂yangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂y忙ng忙sh|n茂n茂y忙ng忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyangash|luyangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luy忙ng忙sh|luy忙ng忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyangash|luluyangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluy忙ng忙sh|luluy忙ng忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyangash|liyangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liy忙ng忙sh|liy忙ng忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyangash|liliyangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliy忙ng忙sh|liliy忙ng忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyangash|koyangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koy忙ng忙sh|koy忙ng忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyangash|kokoyangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoy忙ng忙sh|kokoy忙ng忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyangash|keyangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:key忙ng忙sh|key忙ng忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyangash|kekeyangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekey忙ng忙sh|kekey忙ng忙sh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
